description: Pre-approved safe prompt templates by role and department

templates.title: General Summary Request
templates.template: Summarize the following topic: [TOPIC]. Focus on key points and actionable insights.

templates.title: Marketing Copy Draft
templates.template: Draft marketing copy for a [PRODUCT_TYPE] targeting [AUDIENCE]. Tone: [TONE]. Key message: [MESSAGE].

templates.title: Data Analysis Template
templates.template: Analyze the following trends: [DESCRIBE_TRENDS]. What patterns emerge and what actions would you recommend?

templates.title: Report Structure Request
templates.template: Create an outline for a [REPORT_TYPE] report covering: [TOPICS]. Include sections for executive summary, findings, and recommendations.

templates.title: Supply Chain Query
templates.template: What are best practices for [SUPPLY_CHAIN_TOPIC] in the beverage industry? Include recent trends and optimization strategies.
